description: Sample natural-language questions for testing the text-to-SQL agent against the Pagila DVD rental database.

questions.message: How many films are in the database?
List the names of all film categories.
What are the titles of the 5 longest films?
Show customers whose first name is Mary.
How many customers are there in total?
Which actors appear in the film Academy Dinosaur?
What are the top 5 most-rented films by rental count?
What is the average rental duration in days?
List the email addresses of customers who live in India.
Which films are rated PG-13?
How many rentals were made at each store?
Who are the staff members and which store do they work at?
What is the total payment amount per customer? Show the top 5 customers.
Which films are in the Comedy category?
List films released in 2006 with a replacement cost over 20.
Which 5 actors have appeared in the most films?
What is the total revenue by store?
Which customers have never rented a film?
For each language, how many films are available?
What are the 5 cities with the most customers?
Which films have never been rented?
Show rentals that were returned late, where return date is after the due date.
What is the average payment amount per month in 2007?
Which staff member processed the most rentals?
List the titles of films starring an actor named Penelope.
